title: Can not create an automation
excerpt:
I´ve created some automations without any problems. But on some boards it is not possible to click Add to board after I have created the automation. 
I do not see any reason for this. 
Do you have any suggestions? 
/ bjö…

posts.author: Bjorn (Björn Eriksson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I´ve created some automations without any problems. But on some boards it is not possible to click Add to board after I have created the automation.

I do not see any reason for this.

Do you have any suggestions?

/ björn
